mechanism_narrative: Higher trailing 3-month growth in retail sales signals stronger household demand and revenue momentum, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the sales trend is above its recent average.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher average 20-day SPX returns than negative RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or if Rank IC is below 0.03 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above 3% while rising over 3 months tightens discount rates and financial conditions, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 3.0% and its 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if triggered mean returns are not below non-triggered mean returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll deceleration combined with a rising unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor income and recession risk, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth slows versus its prior 3-month growth and UNRATE rises > 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS slowdown and UNRATE rise signal has nonnegative average 60-day SPX returns, or if either single proxy alone explains the full effect in interaction tests.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in industrial production reflects improving real output and operating leverage, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when production momentum is rising.
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month INDPRO momentum is followed by positive 60-day SPX returns no more often than falling momentum, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A housing starts breakdown below its 12-month trend signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction activity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakdown triggers are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or if triggered returns are not lower than baseline at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration during a rising-rate environment forces tighter policy expectations and raises equity discount rates, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth rises versus its prior reading and FEDFUNDS increases over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPI acceleration and FEDFUNDS increase signal has nonnegative average 5-day SPX returns, or if an interaction term adds no predictive power over single-series effects.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment-rate rise from a recent low signals labor-market inflection and higher earnings-risk premia, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE-rise triggers do not underperform non-triggered observations over 20 trading days, or if triggered negative-hit-rate is below 52% in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth combined with stable or easing policy rates signals expansion without a discount-rate shock, causing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and FEDFUNDS 3-month change is <= 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-GDPC1 and non-rising-FEDFUNDS condition has average 60-day SPX returns below zero, or if it fails to outperform positive-GDPC1-alone cases.
